pageTitle: Agassiz & BC Mortgage Broker - Kenward Mortgage Inc.

data.body:
Welcome to Kenward Mortgage Broker Inc.

As a licensed mortgage broker in BC and a member of CMBABC, I specialize in finding the best solutions for homeowners in Agassiz and across British Columbia. My goal is to ensure you **Be secure. Be well. Thrive**.

We use a robust pipeline architecture to ensure every detail of your application is validated and processed against industry standards, including the **5 C's of Credit**.

data.altText: Exterior view of Kenward Mortgage Broker Inc. office in Agassiz, BC.
data.caption: Local expertise, digital security.

data.quoteText: The commitment to security and transparency in the mortgage process is unmatched.
